text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki Shuttle asks me to watch her dance practice.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let's get this show on the road! Ready to dance,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ya sure are! It's no fun dancin' solo!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Good to go? I'm starting the music!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Caught off guard, I find myself dancing with
Taiki...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It's so much fun dancin' with ya, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You okay? You seem a little tuckered out.
choice_data_list: Could you teach me the choreography first?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You okay? You seem a little tuckered out.
choice_data_list: Could you teach me the choreography first?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, really? Sounds good to me! I'd love to keep
dancin' with ya!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
This here studio is our very own dance floor! Ain't
nobody gonna get in our way!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm puttin' the music back on! So let's kick up our
heels! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue to dance right up until the final
school bell chimes.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, did I jump the gun? Sorry 'bout that! All right,
this time we'll take it nice and slow!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Try to follow my lead, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... First of all, ya gotta lift your arms like
this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Walking me through the choreography seems to
aid in Taiki Shuttle's own improvement as well.
